original: Gary Sentman draws a record 176 lb longbow to a maximum 28½" draw

Dale Chihuly, American glass sculptor (Louis Tiffany Award 1967), born in Tacoma, Washington

German rocket engineers begin work in US

1st FORTRAN computer program run

United States ends its "Don't Ask, Don't Tell" policy, allowing gay men and women to serve openly in the armed forces

Frank De Vol, American pop arranger, composer (theme songs to My Three Sons, The Brady Bunch, Family Affair; Hush...Hush, Sweet Charlotte), orchestra leader, and actor (Fernwood 2-Night - "Happy Kyne"; The Big Mouth), born in Moundsville, West Virginia (d. 1999)

Peace of Saki (ends 9 years war)
